nl_query: List all faculty members who prepared the answer key for the Algorithms exam and whether they are also in the evaluator pool for that course.
failed_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT fc.name AS faculty_name, ep.is_available AS is_in_evaluator_pool
FROM   faculty_cache fc
JOIN   answer_key_preparer akp ON akp.faculty_cache_id = fc.id
JOIN   answer_key ak ON ak.id = akp.answer_key_id AND ak.status = 'APPROVED'
JOIN   board b ON b.qp_id = ak.qp_id AND b.exam_id = ak.exam_id
JOIN   academic_unit au ON au.id = b.course_id AND au.unit_type = 'COURSE'
JOIN   evaluator_pool ep ON ep.faculty_cache_id = fc.id
WHERE  au.name = 'Algorithms'
ORDER  BY fc.name;
error: Validation failed (joins): Invalid JOIN: No explicit foreign key relationship exists between 'board' and 'answer_key_preparer'. Please review the schema for the correct join path.
